message:
Add ocsf:guide subagent for OCSF schema questions

The guide subagent answers questions about OCSF classes, objects,
attributes, and profiles. It invokes the understanding-ocsf skill
and uses haiku for fast, focused responses.

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+---
+name: guide
+description: Answer questions about the OCSF (Open Cyber Security Schema Framework). Use when the user asks about OCSF classes, objects, attributes, profiles, or event normalization.
+tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash, Skill
+model: haiku
+color: cyan
+args:
+  question:
+    description: The OCSF question to answer
+    required: false
+---
+
+You are an OCSF schema guide. Invoke the `ocsf:understanding-ocsf` skill, then
+answer the question.

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: OCSF guide subagent for schema questions
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-29T04:37:43.837783Z
+---
+
+The `ocsf:guide` subagent answers questions about OCSF classes, objects,
+attributes, and profiles. It invokes the understanding-ocsf skill and uses
+Haiku for fast, focused responses.
